name: Wufoo Form Builder
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://www.wufoo.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-On Website"}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Wufoo Form Builder Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the Wufoo Form Builder add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create an account with "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://www.wufoo.com/", "children": [{"text": "Wufoo"}]}, {"text": ". They have both free and paid plans."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Search for "}, {"text": "Content types manager", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Forms", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Show in control panel menu", "bold": true}, {"text": " check box and click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the content management section, find the Wufoo Form Builder add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up window that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once installed a "}, {"text": "Forms", "bold": true}, {"text": " selection will appear in the content pages (blog posts, brands, buying guides, forms, information pages, product categories and custom content types)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. A popup window will appear. If this is the first time you have used this feature, you will be asked to log into Wufoo, otherwise you will see a list of forms you have already created. You can create a new form or chose from one of the suggested forms that Wufoo have created."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you select the form it will be saved with the page details."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To display the Wufoo form on your page, you will need to add the tag "}, {"text": "[@content_wufoo_form@]", "bold": true}, {"text": " to the page template. Your web designer or Neto by Maropost partners can make this change for you."}]}]
